mapper.sql: ROOM_ID, ROOM_UUID, VISITOR_TYPE, MEMBER_ID, GUEST_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME_SNAPSHOT, ASSIGNED_ADMIN_ID, STATUS, CUSTOMER_UNANSWERED_COUNT, ADMIN_UNREAD_COUNT, CUSTOMER_UNREAD_COUNT, LAST_MESSAGE_PREVIEW, LAST_MESSAGE_SENDER_TYPE, CREATED_AT, ACCEPTED_AT, LAST_MESSAGE_AT, UPDATED_AT, CLOSED_AT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CUSTOMER_CHAT_GUEST( GUEST_ID, GUEST_TOKEN_HASH, GUEST_NICKNAME, BLOCKED_YN, CREATED_AT, LAST_SEEN_AT, EXPIRES_AT )VALUES( #{guestId}, #{guestTokenHash}, #{guestNickname}, 'N', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP + NUMTODSINTERVAL(30, 'DAY') )
mapper.select: SELECT GUEST_ID, GUEST_TOKEN_HASH, GUEST_NICKNAME, BLOCKED_YN, CREATED_AT, LAST_SEEN_AT, EXPIRES_AT FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_GUEST WHERE GUEST_TOKEN_HASH = #{guestTokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_GUEST SET LAST_SEEN_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, EXPIRES_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP + NUMTODSINTERVAL(30,'DAY') WHERE GUEST_ID = #{guestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM( ROOM_ID, ROOM_UUID, VISITOR_TYPE, MEMBER_ID, GUEST_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME_SNAPSHOT, STATUS, CREATED_AT, LAST_MESSAGE_AT, UPDATED_AT )VALUES( #{roomId}, #{roomUuid}, 'MEMBER', #{memberId}, null, #{customerName}, 'WAITING', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM( ROOM_ID, ROOM_UUID, VISITOR_TYPE, MEMBER_ID, GUEST_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME_SNAPSHOT, STATUS, CREATED_AT, LAST_MESSAGE_AT, UPDATED_AT )VALUES( #{roomId}, #{roomUuid}, 'GUEST', null, #{guestId}, #{customerName}, 'WAITING', SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'CHATTING') AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT
FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM WHERE GUEST_ID = #{guestId} AND STATUS IN ('WAITING', 'CHATTING') AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT
FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM WHERE ROOM_UUID = #{roomUuid} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CUSTOMER_CHAT_MESSAGE( MESSAGE_ID, ROOM_ID, CLIENT_MESSAGE_UUID, SENDER_TYPE, SENDER_MEMBER_ID, SENDER_NAME_SNAPSHOT, MESSAGE_TYPE, CONTENT, CREATED_AT )VALUES( #{messageId}, #{roomId}, #{clientMessageUuid}, #{senderType}, #{senderMemberId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{senderName}, #{messageType}, #{content}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT M.MESSAGE_ID, M.ROOM_ID, R.ROOM_UUID, M.CLIENT_MESSAGE_UUID, M.SENDER_TYPE, M.SENDER_MEMBER_ID, M.SENDER_NAME_SNAPSHOT, M.MESSAGE_TYPE, M.CONTENT, M.CREATED_AT, M.READ_AT FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_MESSAGE M INNER JOIN CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM R ON R.ROOM_ID = M.ROOM_ID WHERE M.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId}

SELECT M.MESSAGE_ID, M.ROOM_ID, R.ROOM_UUID, M.CLIENT_MESSAGE_UUID, M.SENDER_TYPE, M.SENDER_MEMBER_ID, M.SENDER_NAME_SNAPSHOT, M.MESSAGE_TYPE, M.CONTENT, M.CREATED_AT, M.READ_AT FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_MESSAGE M INNER JOIN CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM R ON R.ROOM_ID = M.ROOM_ID WHERE M.CLIENT_MESSAGE_UUID = #{clientMessageUuid}
mapper.update: UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM SET CUSTOMER_UNANSWERED_COUNT = CUSTOMER_UNANSWERED_COUNT +1, ADMIN_UNREAD_COUNT = ADMIN_UNREAD_COUNT +1, LAST_MESSAGE_PREVIEW = #{preview}, LAST_MESSAGE_SENDER_TYPE = #{senderType}, LAST_MESSAGE_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}

UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM SET ASSIGNED_ADMIN_ID = NVL(ASSIGNED_ADMIN_ID, #{adminId}), STATUS = 'CHATTING', CUSTOMER_UNANSWERED_COUNT = 0, ADMIN_UNREAD_COUNT = 0, CUSTOMER_UNREAD_COUNT = CUSTOMER_UNREAD_COUNT + 1, LAST_MESSAGE_PREVIEW = #{preview}, LAST_MESSAGE_SENDER_TYPE = 'ADMIN', ACCEPTED_AT = NVL(ACCEPTED_AT, SYSTIMESTAMP), LAST_MESSAGE_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}

MERGE INTO CHAT_GUEST_DAILY_USAGE TARGET USING ( SELECT #{guestId} AS GUEST_ID, TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS USAGE_DATE FROM DUAL )SOURCE ON( TARGET.GUEST_ID = SOURCE.GUEST_ID AND TARGET.USAGE_DATE = SOURCE.USAGE_DATE ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GUEST_ID, USAGE_DATE, MESSAGE_COUNT, UPDATED_AT )
VALUES( SOURCE.GUEST_ID, SOURCE.USAGE_DATE, 0, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT MESSAGE_COUNT FROM CHAT_GUEST_DAILY_USAGE WHERE GUEST_ID = #{guestId} AND USAGE_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) FOR UPDATE
SELECT MESSAGE_COUNT FROM CHAT_GUEST_DAILY_USAGE WHERE GUEST_ID = #{guestId} AND USAGE_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE CHAT_GUEST_DAILY_USAGE SET MESSAGE_COUNT = MESSAGE_COUNT + 1, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE GUEST_ID = #{guestId} AND USAGE_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND MESSAGE_COUNT < 10
UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_MESSAGE SET READ_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND SENDER_TYPE = 'ADMIN' AND READ_AT IS NULL
UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM SET CUSTOMER_UNREAD_COUNT = 0, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_MESSAGE SET READ_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND SENDER_TYPE IN( 'MEMBER', 'GUEST') AND READ_AT IS NULL
UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM SET ADMIN_UNREAD_COUNT = 0, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
UPDATE CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM SET STATUS = 'CLOSED', CUSTOMER_UNANSWERED_COUNT = 0, CLOSED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM WHERE STATUS IN ( 'WAITING', 'CHATTING') AND ADMIN_UNREAD_COUNT > 0
SELECT NVL( SUM(ADMIN_UNREAD_COUNT), 0 ) FROM CUSTOMER_CHAT_ROOM WHERE STATUS IN ( 'WAITING', 'CHATTING')
